name: Home Snatch
short_description: As night falls, you find yourself alone at home, where strange events begin to unfold, revealing an evil entity. Survive the night in a desperate struggle with your worst nightmares. In this four-chapter journey, every shadow hides peril, and every noise could spell your demise.
detailed_description:
This game is created by @Mokazar with YAHAHA Horror Game Kit and YAHAHA assists the creator with packaging and publishing the game based on their request. Yahaha Horror Gamekit is tailored for imaginative creators and players who adore horror games, all without the need for any programming expertise.

What's the game about?

In Home Snatch, a seemingly tranquil town is plagued by unexplained disappearances. As night falls, you find yourself alone at home, and strange occurrences begin to unfold, sending shivers down your spine. It quickly becomes clear that something sinister is at play.
Prepare yourself for an intense and nerve-wracking experience as you step into the shoes of one of the victims of these mysterious abductions. Your worst nightmares come to life, and surviving the night becomes a desperate battle for your very existence. Every shadow hides a deadly danger, and every noise could be your last.
To survive this four-chapter adventure, you'll need to solve challenging puzzles, escape unrelenting attacks, and rely on your brains and instincts. The game is intended to keep you on your toes, blending aspects of horror, suspense, and strategy to create an amazing gaming experience. It is a puzzle-solving, story-driven game where players must gather clues and avoid terrifying monster lurking nearby. Dive deep into the mystery, discover the truth about the disappearances, and fight for survival throughout the night. Each clue you uncover brings you closer to solving the town's dark secrets, and each step you take could mean the difference between life and death. Are you ready to uncover the truth and make it through the night?

Key features:

  • Engaging puzzle-solving and adventure gameplay
  • Immersive and unique storytelling
  • Heart-pounding, unexpected jump scares

Designer's Comment:

As the designer of Home Snatch, I want to express my deepest gratitude for your support. This game draws inspiration from films like HOSTEL and other chilling cinematic masterpieces. The goal aimed to create an intense and immersive experience that captures the essence of these movies. Your passion drives me to keep pushing the boundaries of horror gaming. Thank you for being a part of this journey with me!
While I've poured my hearts into creating Home Snatch, the game might not be perfect, but I hope the intense atmosphere and gripping story will still deliver a memorable experience. I truly appreciate your understanding and support as I continue to improve and enhance the game based on your feedback. So please feel free to share your ideas and comments with me. Thanks again.
